title: service-accounts — HTTP middleware
description: Three middlewares. `service_account.audit` is auto-applied to every SA-authenticated route and heavy-audits the request. `service_account.verify_jwt` verifies the incoming HS256 JWT (composes auth::JwtVerifier + SA state checks). `service_account.enforce_scope` enforces that JWT claims match request-context headers. All three are AUTH-INFRASTRUCTURE middlewares — mounted downstream in every service that trusts SA JWTs.

middleware.description: Heavy-audit stamping for every request authenticated by an SA JWT. Writes: (a) `service_account.request.audit` activity_log row (method, path, status, service_account_id, application_id, tenant_id, ip_prefix_24, user_agent, correlation_id, duration_ms), (b) `service_account.jwt_verified` activity_log row keyed by jti, (c) records the fingerprint observation via ServiceAccountFingerprinter for anomaly detection, (d) coalesces last_used_at + last_used_ip writes into the `svc:last_used:{id}` cache buffer. Runs AFTER `service_account.verify_jwt` (needs the verified SA in context).
auto_applied_on: Every route on tenant + platform-admin surfaces that accepts SA JWT authentication (composed via the `auth:service_account` guard alias which downstream services define in `identity/auth`).
consumed_by: every downstream service that trusts SA JWTs (sports-service, marketplace-service, ai-service, observability-service, ...)

middleware.description: Extracts the `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` header, decodes + verifies the signature via auth::JwtVerifier (keyed by the JWT's `kid` claim), then loads the SA row via `X-Service-Account-Id` header (or the `sub` claim if header absent). Confirms: is_enabled=true, expires_at IS NULL OR > now(), signer_kid matches JWT header kid, `iss` + `aud` + `exp` pass verification. Populates RequestContext with the resolved ServiceAccount + parsed claims. On failure returns 401 with generic SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JWT_INVALID payload (no enumeration signal).
auto_applied_on: Every route composing the `auth:service_account` guard alias.
consumed_by: every downstream service that trusts SA JWTs

middleware.description: Confirms request-context headers match JWT claims. Rejects with 403 APPLICATION_MISMATCH when JWT `app` != request's resolved application context. Rejects with 403 TENANT_MISMATCH when JWT `tid` is populated AND != request's resolved tenant context. Rejects with 403 SERVICE_ACCOUNT_IP_NOT_ALLOWED when the SA has an IP allowlist in metadata AND the source IP isn't allowed (enterprise entitlement + Wave 1b enforcement). Runs AFTER `service_account.verify_jwt` (needs the JWT claims) and AFTER `application::ResolveApplication` (needs the request-context application).
auto_applied_on: Every route composing the `auth:service_account` guard alias.
consumed_by: every downstream service that trusts SA JWTs

consumed.notes: Global request-throttle applies alongside; the SA-specific rate limit at the token-exchange endpoint is ON TOP for the credential-swap route.
